arts.ttl: “Mind-blowing” – How close Man United star came to joining Europa League final opponents Spurs
arts.sum: Manchester United star Bruno Fernandes reportedly came very close to joining Tottenham just a few months before he ended up at Old Trafford. The Portugal international has been a rare success story for Man Utd in the post-Sir Alex Ferguson era, proving to be an inspired signing from Sporting Lisbon in January 2020. Fernandes will […] The post “Mind-blowing” – How close Man United star came to joining Europa League final opponents Spurs appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Europa League final: How to watch Man Utd vs Tottenham for FREE tonight
arts.sum: Manchester United's game against Tottenham in the Europa League final in Bilbao on Wednesday night will be available to watch for free online, via the Discovery+ app

arts.ttl: Spanish media hit out at Man United and Tottenham fans for 'destroying the Bilbao streets' ahead of Europa League final - as Brits are spotted tearing down traffic lights and vomiting on the road after night of violence
arts.sum: Spanish news agency EFE reported that 'some fans are already losing control' in the streets in the centre of Bilbao ahead of the Europa League final at the San Mames Stadium.

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Man United Europa League final combined XI: Spurs dominate despite injury problems with only three Red Devils stars included
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur's battle against Manchester United is one of the strangest Europa League finals ever with both side desperate for a trophy to end their miserable campaigns.

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Manchester United - Europa League Final LIVE: Build-up, team news and updates as fans drink on the streets of Bilbao ahead of huge clash
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest score, team news and updates as Tottenham and Manchester United meet in the 2024-25 Europa League final in the San Mames Stadium in Bilbao.

arts.ttl: Tottenham and Manchester United fans descend on Bilbao for Europa League final – live
arts.sum: All the latest news before the final, 8pm BST kick-off Jonathan Wilson: why this game matters | Email Tom Lots of statistical fun to be had with tonight’s final, and The Knowledge this week has gone in hard on them, asking whether tonight’s match features the worst aggregate domestic league positions of any European finalists. arts.ttl: Man Utd and Tottenham legend makes bold Europa League final prediction
arts.sum: Manchester United and Tottenham come into the Europa League final with poor defensive records and Teddy Sheringham thinks that will spell plenty of goals at both ends
